reviews.name: David
reviews.text: Angular Signals made state management much smoother and easier to maintain.

reviews.name: Emily
reviews.text: This review slider is clean, fast, and very beginner-friendly to use.

reviews.name: Ali Raza
reviews.text: The interface feels modern and the review switching animation is very smooth.

reviews.name: Nadine
reviews.text: A simple and effective component that works perfectly for showcasing customer feedback.
